perfectPractice.headline: You keep trash-talking the customer's current tool.
reasons: This happened on 4 recent calls and didn't work out well, as you lost all of them: [1][2][3][4].
Instead, if you ask about their problems, you'll be successful about 9 of 10 times: [1].

In one call, you spoke with Nina Becker from Cobalt Finance. She mentioned using Microsoft Teams, but instead of finding out what issues she had, you criticized the tool, saying it's bloated and slow, which didn't help you: [1].

citations.quote: Honestly, Microsoft Teams is bloated and slow.
I get that, but imagine how much more efficient your team could be with a tool that doesn’t feel like a chore to use.

Honestly, Discord is bloated and slow.
